title: Mystery Orbs Spook Northeast Skies As Pentagon Drops New UFO Files
description: The Department of War's third PURSUE release posts 72 UAP files, including videos from Oct 2024 and July 2025 showing orbs over the Northeast.

title: Department of Defense publish third release of UAP files, references to southern Colorado
description: The Department of Defense (COD) published the third release of Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP), also known as UFO, files, with one sighting mentioned over Cheyenne Mountain.

title: Watch: Pentagon releases 6 new UFO videos
description: The Defense Department released a third batch of UFO files on Friday, three weeks after its second drop. These are all of the videos in the latest tranche, plus analysis from astrophysicist Avi Loeb.

title: New UFO files describe spinning discs, glowing orbs and one object shaped like a potato
description: WASHINGTON (AP) — One was a rotating disc that sent out beams of light. Another was a shining red orb of a hue the observer had never seen before. Then there was the one compared to a potato, and also a bean, but with a coat of shimmering, fish-like scales. Those were some of the...
